title: Amendment Notification Declaring Eco Sensitive Zone S.O. No. 107(E) around Sajjangarh wildlife Sanctuary

(ii) उपाबंध II के 瀡थान पर, इस अिधसूचना के साथ संल猶 उपाबंध रखा जाएगा; (iii) उपाबंध III म犆, सारणी म犆, 灙म सं榐या 17, 18, 19 और 20 灙मशः 灙म सं榐या 19, 20, 21 और 22 के 牲प म犆 पुनः स榐यांक琉 琈कया जायेगा और इस 灹कार पुनः स榐यांक琉 灙म सं榐या 19, 20, 21 और 22 से पहले, िन玈िलिखत को अ瀈तः 瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, अथा榁त्: - “灙 灙 灙 灙.सं संसं सं. जी पी एस जी पी एस जी पी एस जी पी एस देशांतर देशांतर देशांतर देशांतर अ楹ांश अ楹ांश अ楹ांश अ楹ांश 17 ई16/1 73o39.534’ पू 24o35.449’ पू 18 ई 16/2 73o39.341’ पू 24o35.812’ पू”. [फा. सं. 25/34/2015-ईएसजेड-आरई] डॉ. सतीश च瀈灶 गढ़कोटी, वै榀ािनक ‘जी’ 琇ट瀉पणी 琇ट瀉पणी 琇ट瀉पणी 琇ट瀉पणी :::: मूल अिधसूचना (ii) सं榐याक- का.आ. 435(अ), तारीख 14 फरवरी, 2017 獧ारा भारत के राजप灴 असाधारण, भाग II, खंड 3, उपखंड (ii) म犆 灹कािशत क琉 गई थी। उपाबंध उपाबंध उपाबंध उपाबंध-II स榖ज स榖ज स榖ज स榖जनगढ़ व瀈य नगढ़ व瀈य नगढ़ व瀈य नगढ़ व瀈यजीव अभयार瀃य जीव अभयार瀃य जीव अभयार瀃य जीव अभयार瀃य, उदयपुर उदयपुर उदयपुर उदयपुर, राज瀡था राज瀡था राज瀡था राज瀡थान के पा琇रि瀡थितक琉 संवेदी जोन के भू न के पा琇रि瀡थितक琉 संवेदी जोन के भू न के पा琇रि瀡थितक琉 संवेदी जोन के भू न के पा琇रि瀡थितक琉 संवेदी जोन के भू----िनद犇शांक िनद犇शांक िनद犇शांक िनद犇शांक -- 2 of 4 -- ¹भाग IIμख瀃ड 3(ii)º भारत का राजप灴 : असाधारण 3 MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 6th January, 2020 S.O. 107(E).—WHEREAS by the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change number S.O. 435(E), dated the 14th February 2017 (hereinafter in this notification referred to as the said notification), the Central Government notified an Eco-Sensitive Zone (ESZ) surrounding the Sajjangarh Wildlife Sanctuary in the State of Rajasthan and imposed few restrictions in the said Zone; AND WHEREAS, pursuant to the State Government’s request seeking amendment in the said notification, vide letter dated the 13th December, 2018, the Expert Committee on ESZ recommended amendment in the notification during its 35th meeting held on the 3rd June 2019; AND WHEREAS, the Central Government in public interest dispenses with the requirement of notice under clause (a) of sub-rule (3) of rule 5 of the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986; NOW, THEREFORE, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1), clauses (v) and (xiv) of sub–section (2) and sub-section (3) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986) read with sub-rule (4) of rule 5 of the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the said notification, namely: - In the said notification,- (i) in paragraph 1, for the words and figures “area of 28.7 square kilometers”, the words and figures “area of 29.8 square kilometers” shall be substituted; (ii) for Annexure II, the Annexure attached with this notification shall be substituted; (iii) in Annexure III, in the Table, serial numbers 17, 18, 19 and 20 shall be renumbered as serial numbers 19, 20, 21 and 22 respectively and before the serial numbers 19, 20, 21 and 22 as so renumbered, the following shall be inserted, namely:- “Sl.No. GPS Longitude Latitude 17 E16/1 73o39.534’ E 24o35.449’ E 18 E16/2 73o39.341’ E 24o35.812’ E”. [F.No. 25/34/2015-ESZ-RE] Dr. SATISH C. GARKOTI, Scientist ’G’ Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Para II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), vide number S. O. 435(E), dated the 14th February, 2017. -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] “Annexure-II Geo-coordinates of Eco-sensitive Zone of Sajjangarh Wildlife Sanctuary, Udaipur , Rajasthan Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 4 of 4 --
